title: CountryRegistry
description: One document per country stored in MongoDB's `countries` collection. The backend upserts this automatically as worker messages arrive. The frontend reads it to discover available levels, themes, indicators, and periods — so nothing is hardcoded in the UI.

country_name.description: Display name in the country's language, e.g. Brasil

levels.description: Administrative division levels present, in zoom order, e.g. [UF, municipio]

themes.description: Themes for which at least one indicator exists

available_indicators.description: Indicator keys present, grouped by theme. Derived from all snapshot documents for this country.

periods.description: Periods present, e.g. [2022, 2023]. Powers the (later) year slider.

workers.description: Names of data-source workers that have provided data, e.g. [ibge, siconfi, datasus, aneel, transparencia]

last_scraped.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the most recent successful scrape
